description_long: This house features a modern, boxy architectural design with clean lines and a flat roof. The exterior combines white plastered walls with natural wood paneling and large, vertically oriented windows, creating a striking contrast. The house is two stories tall, with a prominent balcony and a rooftop terrace, both bordered by sleek metal railings. The front entryway is accentuated by a small porch with wooden steps and a covered overhang, leading to a recessed main door. The property is set on a rectangular plot with a paved driveway and walkway, surrounded by a manicured lawn. The overall appearance is contemporary and minimalist, emphasizing geometric forms and open, light-filled spaces.
description: A modern two-story house with a flat roof, wood and white exterior, large vertical windows, and a rooftop terrace. The design is minimalist with a prominent entry porch and paved driveway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry porch, steps, and a clear view of the balcony and rooftop terrace.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood paneling, symmetrical window arrangement, and the paved driveway extending along the side.
description_view_2: Rear angled view displaying the back entrance, additional windows, and the driveway leading to the rear of the property.
description_view_3: Back view showing the rear facade, more windows, and the continuation of the paved walkway and lawn.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows of large vertical windows
attribute_entryway_design: Recessed main door with wooden steps, a small porch, and a flat overhang
